name: obadh-engine-web
description: Web interface for the Obadh Engine - A Roman to Bengali transliteration engine

scripts.dev: npm run watch & npm run serve
scripts.copy-wasm: mkdir -p js && cp ../pkg/*.js js/ && cp ../pkg/*.wasm js/ && for jsfile in js/*.js; do sed -i.bak 's|import.meta.url, "../pkg/|import.meta.url, "|g' "$jsfile" && rm -f "$jsfile.bak"; done
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.build-dist: npm run build-wasm && npm run build

author: NSS Sayom
